ddls:
CREATE TABLE "administrative_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative unit */,
  "gisco_id" TEXT /* GISCO ID of the administrative unit */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the administrative unit is located */,
  "nuts_2" TEXT /* NUTS 2 level code */,
  "nuts_3" TEXT /* NUTS 3 level code */,
  "lau_id" TEXT /* LAU ID of the administrative unit */,
  "lau_name" TEXT /* Name of the LAU */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the administrative unit */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the administrative unit in square kilometers */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "fid" TEXT /* FID of the administrative unit */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the administrative unit's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the administrative unit's centroid */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administrative_units_nuts_3 FOREIGN KEY ("nuts_3") REFERENCES nuts_3_regions ("nuts_3_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administrative_units_lau_id FOREIGN KEY ("lau_id") REFERENCES lau_units ("lau_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administrative_units_nuts_2 FOREIGN KEY ("nuts_2") REFERENCES nuts_2_regions ("nuts_2_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "nuts_2_regions" (
  "nuts_2_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NUTS 2 region */,
  "nuts_2_code" TEXT /* NUTS 2 code */,
  "nuts_2_name" TEXT /* Name of the NUTS 2 region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the NUTS 2 region in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the NUTS 2 region */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nuts_2_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nuts_3_regions" (
  "nuts_3_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NUTS 3 region */,
  "nuts_3_code" TEXT /* NUTS 3 code */,
  "nuts_3_name" TEXT /* Name of the NUTS 3 region */,
  "nuts_2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the NUTS 2 region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the NUTS 3 region in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the NUTS 3 region */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nuts_3_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nuts_3_regions_nuts_2_id FOREIGN KEY ("nuts_2_id") REFERENCES nuts_2_regions ("nuts_2_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lau_units" (
  "lau_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LAU unit */,
  "lau_code" TEXT /* LAU code */,
  "lau_name" TEXT /* Name of the LAU unit */,
  "nuts_3_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the NUTS 3 region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the LAU unit */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the LAU unit in square kilometers */,
  "mayor" TEXT /* Name of the mayor */,
  "city_hall_address" TEXT /* Address of the city hall */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lau_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lau_units_nuts_3_id FOREIGN KEY ("nuts_3_id") REFERENCES nuts_3_regions ("nuts_3_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the administrative unit */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the data version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the current version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES administrative_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality check */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the administrative unit */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the data quality check was performed */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the data quality check */,
  "check_message" TEXT /* Message describing the data quality check result */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES administrative_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the administrative unit */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_date" TEXT /* Date the data was sourced */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES administrative_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
